name: Baked Ziti
recipeIngredient: 1 pound canned boiled onions, drained and cut into halves
1 pound mozzarella cheese, sliced or grated
1 pound ziti or other long tube pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, brown sausage links until well done. Drain them.
3. Slice the sausage into 1/2-inch slices and return them to the drained skillet.
4. Add mushrooms, onions, and spaghetti sauce. Cover and simmer for 15 seconds.
5. Stir occasionally and cook pasta until just tender.
6. Place half of the pasta in a 13x9-inch pan.
7. Top with mozzarella cheese, half of the sauce, remaining pasta, and remaining sauce.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
NOTES:
- You can use cooked, cubed fresh onions instead of canned ones.
- The dish can easily be halved.
